열왕기상 22:1.content: They continued three years without war between Syria and Israel.

열왕기상 22:2.content: In the third year, Jehoshaphat the king of Judah came down to the king of Israel.

열왕기상 22:3.content: The king of Israel said to his servants, “You know that Ramoth Gilead is ours, and we do nothing, and don’t take it out of the hand of the king of Syria?”

열왕기상 22:4.content: He said to Jehoshaphat, “Will you go with me to battle to Ramoth Gilead?” Jehoshaphat said to the king of Israel, “I am as you are, my people as your people, my horses as your horses.”

열왕기상 22:5.content: Jehoshaphat said to the king of Israel, “Please inquire first for Yahweh’s word.”

열왕기상 22:6.content: Then the king of Israel gathered the prophets together, about four hundred men, and said to them, “Should I go against Ramoth Gilead to battle, or should I refrain?” They said, “Go up; for the Lord will deliver it into the hand of the king.”

열왕기상 22:7.content: But Jehoshaphat said, “Isn’t there here a prophet of Yahweh, that we may inquire of him?”

열왕기상 22:8.content: The king of Israel said to Jehoshaphat, “There is yet one man by whom we may inquire of Yahweh, Micaiah the son of Imlah; but I hate him, for he does not prophesy good concerning me, but evil.” Jehoshaphat said, “Don’t let the king say so.”

열왕기상 22:9.content: Then the king of Israel called an officer, and said, “Quickly get Micaiah the son of Imlah.”

열왕기상 22:10.content: Now the king of Israel and Jehoshaphat the king of Judah were sitting each on his throne, arrayed in their robes, in an open place at the entrance of the gate of Samaria; and all the prophets were prophesying before them.

열왕기상 22:11.content: Zedekiah the son of Chenaanah made himself horns of iron, and said, “Yahweh says, ‘With these you will push the Syrians, until they are consumed.’ ”

열왕기상 22:12.content: All the prophets prophesied so, saying, “Go up to Ramoth Gilead, and prosper; for Yahweh will deliver it into the hand of the king.”

열왕기상 22:13.content: The messenger who went to call Micaiah spoke to him, saying, “See now, the prophets declare good to the king with one mouth. Please let your word be like the word of one of them, and speak good.”

열왕기상 22:14.content: Micaiah said, “As Yahweh lives, what Yahweh says to me, that I will speak.”

열왕기상 22:15.content: When he had come to the king, the king said to him, “Micaiah, shall we go to Ramoth Gilead to battle, or shall we forbear?” He answered him, “Go up and prosper; and Yahweh will deliver it into the hand of the king.”

열왕기상 22:16.content: The king said to him, “How many times do I have to adjure you that you speak to me nothing but the truth in Yahweh’s name?”

열왕기상 22:17.content: He said, “I saw all Israel scattered on the mountains, as sheep that have no shepherd. Yahweh said, ‘These have no master. Let them each return to his house in peace.’ ”

열왕기상 22:18.content: The king of Israel said to Jehoshaphat, “Didn’t I tell you that he would not prophesy good concerning me, but evil?”

열왕기상 22:19.content: Micaiah said, “Therefore hear Yahweh’s word. I saw Yahweh sitting on his throne, and all the army of heaven standing by him on his right hand and on his left.

열왕기상 22:20.content: Yahweh said, ‘Who will entice Ahab, that he may go up and fall at Ramoth Gilead?’ One said one thing; and another said another.

열왕기상 22:21.content: A spirit came out and stood before Yahweh, and said, ‘I will entice him.’

열왕기상 22:22.content: Yahweh said to him, ‘How?’ He said, ‘I will go out and will be a lying spirit in the mouth of all his prophets.’ He said, ‘You will entice him, and will also prevail. Go out and do so.’

열왕기상 22:23.content: Now therefore, behold, Yahweh has put a lying spirit in the mouth of all these your prophets; and Yahweh has spoken evil concerning you.”

열왕기상 22:24.content: Then Zedekiah the son of Chenaanah came near, and struck Micaiah on the cheek, and said, “Which way did Yahweh’s Spirit go from me to speak to you?”

열왕기상 22:25.content: Micaiah said, “Behold, you will see on that day, when you go into an inner room to hide yourself.”

열왕기상 22:26.content: The king of Israel said, “Take Micaiah, and carry him back to Amon the governor of the city, and to Joash the king’s son.

열왕기상 22:27.content: Say, ‘The king says, “Put this fellow in the prison, and feed him with bread of affliction and with water of affliction, until I come in peace.” ’ ”

열왕기상 22:28.content: Micaiah said, “If you return at all in peace, Yahweh has not spoken by me.” He said, “Listen, all you people!”

열왕기상 22:29.content: So the king of Israel and Jehoshaphat the king of Judah went up to Ramoth Gilead.

열왕기상 22:30.content: The king of Israel said to Jehoshaphat, “I will disguise myself, and go into the battle; but you put on your robes.” The king of Israel disguised himself, and went into the battle.

열왕기상 22:31.content: Now the king of Syria had commanded the thirty-two captains of his chariots, saying, “Don’t fight with small nor great, except only with the king of Israel.”

열왕기상 22:32.content: When the captains of the chariots saw Jehoshaphat, they said, “Surely that is the king of Israel!” and they came over to fight against him. Jehoshaphat cried out.

열왕기상 22:33.content: When the captains of the chariots saw that it was not the king of Israel, they turned back from pursuing him.

열왕기상 22:34.content: A certain man drew his bow at random, and struck the king of Israel between the joints of the armor. Therefore he said to the driver of his chariot, “Turn your hand, and carry me out of the battle; for I am severely wounded.”

열왕기상 22:35.content: The battle increased that day. The king was propped up in his chariot facing the Syrians, and died at evening. The blood ran out of the wound into the bottom of the chariot.

열왕기상 22:36.content: A cry went throughout the army about the going down of the sun, saying, “Every man to his city, and every man to his country!”

열왕기상 22:37.content: So the king died, and was brought to Samaria; and they buried the king in Samaria.

열왕기상 22:38.content: They washed the chariot by the pool of Samaria; and the dogs licked up his blood where the prostitutes washed themselves; according to Yahweh’s word which he spoke.

열왕기상 22:39.content: Now the rest of the acts of Ahab, and all that he did, and the ivory house which he built, and all the cities that he built, aren’t they written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?

열왕기상 22:40.content: So Ahab slept with his fathers; and Ahaziah his son reigned in his place.

열왕기상 22:41.content: Jehoshaphat the son of Asa began to reign over Judah in the fourth year of Ahab king of Israel.

열왕기상 22:42.content: Jehoshaphat was thirty-five years old when he began to reign; and he reigned twenty-five years in Jerusalem. His mother’s name was Azubah the daughter of Shilhi.

열왕기상 22:43.content: He walked in all the way of Asa his father. He didn’t turn away from it, doing that which was right in Yahweh’s eyes. However the high places were not taken away. The people still sacrificed and burned incense on the high places.

열왕기상 22:44.content: Jehoshaphat made peace with the king of Israel.

열왕기상 22:45.content: Now the rest of the acts of Jehoshaphat, and his might that he showed, and how he fought, aren’t they written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

열왕기상 22:46.content: The remnant of the sodomites, that remained in the days of his father Asa, he put away out of the land.

열왕기상 22:47.content: There was no king in Edom. A deputy ruled.

열왕기상 22:48.content: Jehoshaphat made ships of Tarshish to go to Ophir for gold, but they didn’t go; for the ships wrecked at Ezion Geber.

열왕기상 22:49.content: Then Ahaziah the son of Ahab said to Jehoshaphat, “Let my servants go with your servants in the ships.” But Jehoshaphat would not.

열왕기상 22:50.content: Jehoshaphat slept with his fathers, and was buried with his fathers in his father David’s city. Jehoram his son reigned in his place.

열왕기상 22:51.content: Ahaziah the son of Ahab began to reign over Israel in Samaria in the seventeenth year of Jehoshaphat king of Judah, and he reigned two years over Israel.

열왕기상 22:52.content: He did that which was evil in Yahweh’s sight, and walked in the way of his father, and in the way of his mother, and in the way of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, in which he made Israel to sin.

열왕기상 22:53.content: He served Baal and worshiped him, and provoked Yahweh, the God of Israel, to anger in all the ways that his father had done so.
